a.g1: Yes, the system is very flexible and designed to suit various activities such as restaurants, cafes, juice bars, salons, and retail stores.
a.g2: Absolutely, you can start with the free plan (Digital Menu) or request a demo to experience the full POS and dashboard.
a.g3: The digital menu allows your customers to view your products via QR. The POS is the comprehensive system used by your staff to record orders, print invoices, and manage inventory.
a.p1: There are no hidden fees or setup charges. You only pay the subscription fee shown in your chosen plan, monthly or annually.
a.p2: You can upgrade your plan at any time directly from your dashboard with one click.
a.p3: The free menu plan is for trial purposes and will display small, non‑intrusive ads to customers. To enjoy an ad‑free menu with your own branding, upgrade to the Starter plan.
a.t1: Yes, our system is built with Offline‑first technology, so sales and printing continue even if the internet goes down, and data will sync automatically when it returns.
a.t2: No, Mot7km runs as a Web & App on most smart devices and tablets (iPad, Android, laptop), saving you hardware costs.
a.t3: Your data is fully encrypted and stored on highly secure global cloud servers. Only you and your authorized staff can access it.

features.desc: One system, multiple interfaces. We didn't build one app, but a complete operating system providing the right interface for the right person at the right time.

mobile.desc: Lightweight app to monitor daily sales and receive instant notifications wherever you are.
mobile.longDesc: No need to be at the restaurant all the time. The manager app puts every detail in your hands: live sales, order cancellation alerts, and shift performance tracking directly from your phone.
mobile.review: The app saves me from being at the branches. I can see peak sales and who the best cashier is from anywhere.
mobile.title: Mobile App: Execution & Speed

pos.desc: Reliable POS that works even without internet (Offline‑first) to ensure your sales never stop.
pos.longDesc: A POS designed for speed and reliability. Works even in the worst internet conditions (Offline‑first), with a cashier‑friendly interface that prevents order errors and speeds up customer service.
pos.review: The POS response is excellent – we no longer worry about internet outages; the system keeps everything and syncs automatically.
pos.title: Desktop POS: Reliability & Ops

qr.desc: A fast browsing experience for customers, similar to e‑commerce, without installing any apps.
qr.longDesc: The digital menu is not just a food list – it's a smart sales tool. Showcase your dishes with appealing images, and drive customers to order more through smart suggestions and cross‑selling.
qr.review: Our sales increased noticeably because customers now see dish images and easily add extras from their own phones.
qr.title: QR Menu: Frictionless Browsing

web.desc: The main control center. Manage products, financial reports, employees, and deep sales analytics.
web.longDesc: Full control of your revenue and expenses through a cloud dashboard with a modern design that highlights key metrics. Track branch sales, manage inventory and shifts precisely, and get detailed staff performance analysis with one click.
web.review: The dashboard saved us from chaos! With one click I see sales of all branches and make quick decisions based on accurate numbers.
web.title: Web: Thinking & Control

footer.ctaDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter to get the latest features and updates.
footer.desc: A complete cloud‑based operating system (SaaS) designed specifically for cafes and restaurants to manage operations with ease and intelligence.

hero.desc: A multi-sided SaaS platform designed to give business owners centralized control, managers fast operational tools, and customers a frictionless QR experience.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.desc: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Mot7km. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing, registering, or using the Mot7km platform (including the web dashboard, mobile apps, POS systems, and digital QR menus), you confirm your acceptance of these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our services.

s2.title: 2. Eligibility
s2.content: You must be at least 18 years old or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction to use Mot7km. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement.

s3.title: 3. Account Registration
s3.content: To access certain features, you must create an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and keep it updated. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

s4.title: 4. Subscription Plans
s4.content: Mot7km offers various subscription plans (Free, Starter, Business, Pro, Premium, Enterprise). Fees, features, and limits depend on the selected plan. We reserve the right to modify pricing and features with prior notice. Subscriptions are billed according to your chosen billing cycle (monthly or annually) and are generally non-refundable.

s5.title: 5. User Responsibilities
s5.content: You are solely responsible for the content you upload, including menu items, pricing, images, and customer data. You must ensure that your use of Mot7km complies with all applicable local laws, regulations, and industry standards, including data protection laws.

s6.title: 6. Prohibited Activities
s6.content: You agree not to use Mot7km for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. Prohibited activities include but are not limited to: uploading malicious code, attempting to bypass security features, scraping data, selling illicit products, or infringing on the intellectual property of others.

s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.content: The Mot7km platform, including its software, designs, logos, and features, is the exclusive property of Mot7km. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the system for your business operations. You may not copy, reverse-engineer, or resell the platform.

s8.title: 8. Account Suspension & Termination
s8.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties. Upon termination, your right to use the platform will immediately cease.

s9.title: 9. Service Availability
s9.content: While we strive for 99.9% uptime, we do not guarantee uninterrupted access to our cloud services due to maintenance, updates, or unforeseen technical issues. However, our Offline-first POS guarantees continued local operation during internet outages.

s10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
s10.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Mot7km shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising out of your use or inability to use the service.

s11.title: 11. Changes to the Service
s11.content: We regularly update and improve Mot7km. We may add or remove functionalities or features, and we may suspend or stop a service altogether. We will notify you of any material changes to these Terms of Service.

s12.title: 12. Contact Information
s12.content: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact our support team at support@mot7km.com.

usage.title: Acceptable Use Policy
usage.desc: This Acceptable Use Policy ("AUP") explains the rules and standards for using Mot7km and all related services, applications, websites, APIs, and software provided by Mot7km. By using Mot7km, you agree to comply with this policy.

s1.title: 1. Purpose
s1.content: This Acceptable Use Policy ("AUP") explains the rules and standards for using Mot7km and all related services, applications, websites, APIs, and software provided by Mot7km. By using Mot7km, you agree to comply with this policy.

s2.title: 2. Lawful Use Only
s2.content: You may use Mot7km only for lawful business purposes. Users must comply with all applicable local, national, and international laws, regulations, and industry requirements. You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of Mot7km complies with laws applicable to your business and jurisdiction.

s3.title: 3. Content Responsibility
s3.content: Business owners are fully responsible for all content uploaded, published, or shared through Mot7km including: Product information, Menu descriptions, Images, Prices, Customer communications, Reviews and responses, Business information, and Promotional content. Mot7km does not verify, endorse, or guarantee the accuracy of user-generated content.

s4.title: 4. Prohibited Content
s4.content: Users may not upload, publish, distribute, or display content that: Is illegal, Is fraudulent or deceptive, Promotes criminal activities, Violates intellectual property rights, Contains malware or malicious code, Contains harmful or dangerous materials, Infringes privacy rights, Violates consumer protection laws, or Attempts to mislead customers.

s5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
s5.content: Users may only upload content they: Own, Have permission to use, or Have legal rights to distribute. Mot7km may remove content upon receiving legitimate copyright or ownership complaints.

s6.title: 6. No Unauthorized Access
s6.content: Users may not: Attempt to gain unauthorized access, Bypass security controls, Exploit vulnerabilities, Access accounts belonging to others, Reverse engineer protected systems, or Test platform security without authorization.

s7.title: 7. Service Abuse
s7.content: Users may not: Interfere with platform operations, Overload servers intentionally, Perform denial-of-service activities, Automate abusive traffic, Circumvent platform limitations, or Use the platform in a manner that impacts other customers.

s8.title: 8. Fraudulent Activities
s8.content: The following activities are prohibited: Identity impersonation, Fake businesses, Fake customer reviews, Misleading advertising, Payment fraud, Subscription abuse, Account sharing intended to bypass licensing restrictions.

s9.title: 9. User Accounts
s9.content: Account holders are responsible for: Maintaining password confidentiality, Managing team access, Monitoring account activity, and Ensuring authorized use of their account. Mot7km is not responsible for unauthorized access caused by user negligence.

s10.title: 10. Reviews & Customer Feedback
s10.content: Users may not: Manipulate review systems, Submit fake reviews, Purchase fake ratings, or Use automated tools to generate feedback. Mot7km reserves the right to moderate content that violates platform policies.

s11.title: 11. Restaurant & Business Compliance
s11.content: Businesses using Mot7km remain solely responsible for: Food safety compliance, Pricing accuracy, Product availability, Consumer disclosures, Taxes, Employment compliance, Regulatory approvals, and Required business licenses. Mot7km does not operate, manage, or supervise customer businesses.

s12.title: 12. Third-Party Services
s12.content: Users may not misuse integrations with: Payment gateways, Messaging services, Notification providers, or External APIs. All third-party services remain subject to their own terms and policies.

s13.title: 13. Data Usage
s13.content: Users may not: Collect customer data unlawfully, Sell customer data without authorization, Harvest information from the platform, or Use Mot7km to conduct privacy violations. Users must comply with all applicable privacy regulations.

s14.title: 14. Platform Security
s14.content: Users may not upload: Viruses, Trojans, Spyware, Ransomware, Malicious scripts, or Harmful automated software. Mot7km may immediately suspend accounts posing security risks.

s15.title: 15. Enforcement
s15.content: Mot7km may investigate suspected violations and take actions including: Content removal, Feature restrictions, Temporary suspension, Permanent account termination, or Reporting unlawful activities to authorities where legally required.

s16.title: 16. No Liability for User Content
s16.content: Mot7km acts solely as a technology platform. Mot7km is not responsible for: Business decisions made by users, Customer disputes, Food quality, Service quality, Pricing disputes, Employee disputes, Regulatory violations committed by users, or User-generated content. Each business remains solely responsible for its operations and activities.

s17.title: 17. Reporting Violations
s17.content: If you believe a user is violating this policy, contact: Email: legal@mot7km.store or Email: support@mot7km.store

s18.title: 18. Changes to This Policy
s18.content: Mot7km may update this Acceptable Use Policy from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: This Privacy Policy explains how Mot7km collects, uses, stores, protects, and discloses information.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.content: Welcome to Mot7km. This Privacy Policy explains how Mot7km collects, uses, stores, protects, and discloses information when you use our websites, applications, dashboards, APIs, and related services. By using Mot7km, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.content: Account Information: When you create an account, we may collect: Full name, Email address, Phone number, Password (encrypted), Business name, Business type, Country and region. Business Information: To provide our services, we may collect: Restaurant information, Branch information, Menu categories, Products, Product images, Business branding assets, Subscription details. Usage Information: We automatically collect certain usage information, including: Login activity, Device information, Browser information, Application version, Session activity, Feature usage statistics. Analytics Information: We may collect analytics data such as: Menu views, Product views, QR code scans, Search activity, Review activity, User interactions.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Information
s3.content: We use collected data to: Provide platform services, Authenticate users, Manage subscriptions, Generate analytics, Improve platform performance, Respond to support requests, Prevent abuse and fraud, Maintain system security, and Communicate important updates.

s4.title: 4. Customer & End User Data
s4.content: Businesses using Mot7km may collect information from their customers through features such as: Reviews, Ratings, QR Menu interactions, and Search activity. Mot7km processes such information on behalf of the business. The business remains responsible for obtaining any legally required consents from its customers.

s5.title: 5. QR Menu Data Collection
s5.content: When customers access QR Menus, certain non-personal information may be collected, including: Device type, Browser type, Menu view events, Product view events, Search events, and Referral information. This information helps generate analytics for restaurant owners.

s6.title: 6. Cookies & Similar Technologies
s6.content: Mot7km may use cookies and similar technologies to: Maintain user sessions, Remember preferences, Improve performance, Measure usage analytics, and Enhance security. Users may control cookies through browser settings.

s7.title: 7. Data Sharing
s7.content: We do not sell personal information. We may share information only in limited circumstances: Service Providers (we may share information with trusted service providers that support Hosting, Analytics, Communication services, Monitoring services, Payment processing); Legal Requirements (we may disclose information if required to Comply with laws, Respond to legal requests, Protect platform security, Investigate unlawful activities); Business Transfers (if Mot7km is involved in a merger, acquisition, asset sale, or restructuring, user information may be transferred as part of that transaction).

s8.title: 8. Data Security
s8.content: Mot7km implements reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information, including: Encryption, Secure authentication, Access controls, Database protection, Monitoring and auditing, and Security updates. However, no system is completely secure, and absolute security cannot be guaranteed.

s9.title: 9. Data Retention
s9.content: We retain information only as long as necessary to: Provide services, Maintain customer accounts, Comply with legal obligations, Resolve disputes, and Enforce agreements. Data may be deleted, anonymized, or archived when no longer required.

s10.title: 10. User Rights
s10.content: Subject to applicable laws, users may have the right to: Access their data, Correct inaccurate information, Request deletion, Export their data, and Object to certain processing activities. Requests may be submitted through our support channels.

s11.title: 11. Third-Party Services
s11.content: Mot7km may contain integrations or links to third-party services. These services operate under their own privacy policies, and Mot7km is not responsible for their privacy practices. Examples may include: Payment providers, Email providers, Cloud hosting providers, and Analytics services.

s12.title: 12. Children's Privacy
s12.content: Mot7km is intended for businesses and individuals who are legally capable of entering into agreements. Our services are not directed toward children. We do not knowingly collect information from children.

s13.title: 13. International Data Processing
s13.content: Depending on service infrastructure, user data may be processed in different countries where our hosting providers or service partners operate. By using Mot7km, users consent to such processing where legally permitted.

s14.title: 14. Business Responsibility
s14.content: Businesses using Mot7km remain solely responsible for: Their customer communications, Compliance with privacy laws, Customer consent requirements, Restaurant operational activities, and Menu and product information. Mot7km provides technology infrastructure and does not directly manage customer businesses.

s15.title: 15. Changes to This Privacy Policy
s15.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When significant changes are made, we will update the "Last Updated" date and may provide additional notice where required. Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy.

s16.title: 16. Contact Us
s16.content: For privacy-related questions or requests, contact: Mot7km Website: https://mot7km.store Email: privacy@mot7km.store Support: support@mot7km.store

hero.title: About Mot7km
hero.subtitle: The Next Generation of Restaurant Control
hero.desc: Mot7km isn't just a POS. It's the central nervous system for your entire food business, bridging the gap between web control, mobile execution, and customer experience.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.content: For years, restaurants have been plagued by fragmented tools: one system for the cashier, another for the digital menu, and messy spreadsheets for management. When the internet drops, operations halt. When the menu changes, it takes hours to update everywhere.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.content: We built Mot7km from the ground up as a multi-sided ecosystem. We separated planning (Web) from execution (Mobile & Desktop). We made the POS offline-first. And we turned the customer QR menu into an instantaneous, app-less browsing and feedback engine.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Absolute Control. Zero Friction.
mission.content: To empower business owners with deep analytics and total operational control, while equipping their staff with the fastest, most reliable tools to execute daily tasks seamlessly.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: The Global Standard
vision.content: We envision a future where every food business, from the smallest café to the largest restaurant chain, can operate at peak efficiency. Mot7km aims to be the definitive operating system for the global F&B industry.

owners.title: The Command Center
owners.desc: A single source of truth. Manage branches, employees, deep financial analytics, and product catalogs from a centralized cloud interface.

managers.title: On-the-Go Management
managers.desc: Lightweight tools to monitor live shifts, track sales anomalies, and intervene immediately without needing a laptop.

staff.title: Unbreakable Operations
staff.desc: A highly reliable, offline-first POS experience that queues orders safely during internet outages, plus simple mobile apps for attendance.

customers.title: Frictionless Browsing
customers.desc: A blazing-fast web experience. Customers scan a QR code to instantly browse interactive menus and leave real-time feedback.

simplicity.title: Radical Simplicity
simplicity.desc: We distill complex enterprise workflows into intuitive, beautiful interfaces that require zero training.

reliability.title: Unshakeable Reliability
reliability.desc: In the restaurant business, every second counts. Our offline-first architecture ensures you never miss a sale.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.desc: We don't just follow trends; we set them. From advanced analytics to automated sync engines.

success.title: Partnered Success
success.desc: We don't just sell software. We partner with restaurants to guarantee operational growth and profitability.

cta.title: Ready to take control?
cta.subtitle: Join the modern era of restaurant management today.
